response.justification: Candidate is a capable polyglot full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD), but the resume shows little to no recent professional work in Java/Kotlin, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, and no exposure to IDE internals or language tooling at the depth this role demands. Java appears only in brief mentions from 2014-2018, and the dominant stacks are Node/TypeScript and DLang. The role specifically asks for deep JVM expertise and Spring ecosystem mastery, which are not evidenced here.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev, test tooling authorship)
Built developer tools and a test runner (Trial, Fluent-Asserts) — shows genuine interest in tooling
Polyglot with C/C++ IDE component experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java/Kotlin work is minimal, dated, and not the primary stack in any recent role
No evidence of deep JVM internals or large-scale IDE/language-tooling work
